meta.title: About | Maxime Brochot
meta.description: Learn more about Maxime Brochot, his development mindset, core qualities and approach to building web applications.

header.title: About me
header.subtitle: A short introduction to my background, mindset and development approach.

whoIAm.title: Who I am
whoIAm.paragraph1: I am a web and mobile web developer focused on building clear, maintainable and user-focused applications.
whoIAm.paragraph2: I develop my skills through practical projects, structured learning and continuous improvement, with particular attention to architecture, accessibility and code quality.

developmentPhilosophy.title: Development philosophy
developmentPhilosophy.paragraph1: I believe that good applications are built through deliberate decisions, clear structure and continuous refinement.
developmentPhilosophy.paragraph2: Each project is an opportunity to improve not only the final result, but also the way it is designed, documented and maintained.
